calendar.matters:
Petition For Legal Fees And Supplemental Accounting In Support Of Final Discharge
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order

2nd & Final Account & Report Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 285421. Rowena Navia appearing for and with successor trustee/conservator Cassie Nickleson. Sherrie Taylor is in court. Court has no problem with termination of conservatorship. Order signed.
In the Trust case. Offset issue addressed. Period of offset to begin after death of conservatee provided that the conservator has receipts for the payment. Reserve issue addressed. Reserve of $30,000.00 is authorized. No payment of attorney's fees without court order. Court will review the order before signing it.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

2nd & Final Account & Report Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Jan-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
